title: CloudDash REST API — authentication and rate limits
content: The CloudDash REST API is available at `https://api.clouddash.com/v1/`. Authenticate by passing your API key in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header. Rate limits depend on your plan: Starter allows 100 requests/minute, Pro allows 1,000 requests/minute, and Enterprise allows 10,000 requests/minute. If you exceed the limit, the API returns a 429 Too Many Requests response with a `Retry-After` header. We strongly recommend implementing exponential backoff in your API clients to handle rate limits gracefully. This section provides additional context to ensure comprehensive documentation. The CloudDash platform is built with robustness and scalability in mind. When encountering issues, always verify your configuration settings and ensure that your network allows communication with our endpoints. If you continue to experience difficulties, please consult the troubleshooting steps outlined previously. Our support team is available to assist you with any advanced configurations or unexpected behavior. Remember to keep your agent versions up to date to benefit from the latest features and security patches. Furthermore, monitoring your usage limits can prevent unexpected service interruptions. For detailed API specifications, refer to our developer portal. We are committed to providing reliable service and continuous improvements to our platform. Should you have any feedback or feature requests, do not hesitate to reach out. Thank you for choosing CloudDash as your monitoring solution. We hope this guide has been helpful in resolving your query.
